from typing import TypeVar, Sequence
from numbers import Real

T = TypeVar("T", bound=Real)

def clamp(value: T, low: T, high: T) -> T:
    return max(low, min(value, high))

T_co = TypeVar("T_co", covariant=True)

def first(items: Sequence[T_co]) -> T_co:
    return items[0]

T_str_or_bytes = TypeVar("T_str_or_bytes", str, bytes)

def encode_or_passthrough(value: T_str_or_bytes) -> bytes:
    if isinstance(value, str):
        return value.encode("utf-8")
    return value

Numeric = TypeVar("Numeric", int, float)

def normalize(value: Numeric, maximum: Numeric) -> float:
    return float(value) / float(maximum)
